title: The Castle Fight Intensifies
description: On pages 12–15, this part focuses on the castle fight intensifies, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: The Castle Fight Intensifies. Chopper fights Chessmarimo with the power of the Rumble Ball while the struggle for Drum Castle intensifies. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: What Happened to all that confidence of yours earlier!?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: You won't be able to beat me by just running away!

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: I've been searching for your weak point.

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: It's time to finish you off!

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: T-that pose... it's gotta be a beam! He's gonna shoot out a beam for sure!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: You've been searching for my weak point!?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Ha! I don't even have a single blind spot!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: If it's anyone's time to finish someone off,

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Then it's me killing some transforming freak that can't even attack!

summary: This part highlights the castle fight intensifies and moves the chapter forward through its central emotional or plot turn.
